requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance and GSO Energy-Efficiency Label for Lighting (DGSM / GSO)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品最低能效与 GSO 能效标签（DGSM / GSO）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品最低能效與 GSO 能效標籤（DGSM / GSO）

summary.en: Oman applies GSO (Gulf Standardization Organization) energy-efficiency requirements and labelling for lighting products, administered nationally through MOCIIP / DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology). The GSO lighting energy-efficiency labelling scheme requires in-scope LED lamps and luminaires to meet a minimum luminous efficacy and to carry a GSO energy-efficiency label (a star-rated or grade-based label declaring efficacy in lm/W and related performance) before market placement. The mandatory obligation is the DGSM-adopted GSO technical regulation and labelling rule, with luminous efficacy as the primary metric. Product registration with a GSO/DGSM-recognized conformity body and an in-country importer is generally required. Thresholds and the exact label format follow the current GSO energy-efficiency standard for lighting in force at the time of placement.
summary.zh: 阿曼采用 GSO（海湾标准化组织）的照明能效要求与标签，在国家层面由 MOCIIP / DGSM（标准与计量总局）管理。GSO 照明能效标签方案要求适用范围内的 LED 灯与灯具在上市前满足最低光效并贴附 GSO 能效标签（以星级或等级形式声明 lm/W 光效及相关性能）。强制性义务来自 DGSM 采纳的 GSO 技术法规与标签规则，以光效为主要指标。通常须经 GSO/DGSM 认可的合格评定机构进行产品注册并具备在地进口商。阈值与确切标签格式以上市时现行的 GSO 照明能效标准为准。
summary.zht: 阿曼採用 GSO（海灣標準化組織）的照明能效要求與標籤，在國家層面由 MOCIIP / DGSM（標準與計量總局）管理。GSO 照明能效標籤方案要求適用範圍內的 LED 燈與燈具在上市前滿足最低光效並貼附 GSO 能效標籤（以星級或等級形式聲明 lm/W 光效及相關性能）。強制性義務來自 DGSM 採納的 GSO 技術法規與標籤規則，以光效為主要指標。通常須經 GSO/DGSM 認可的合格評定機構進行產品註冊並具備在地進口商。閾值與確切標籤格式以上市時現行的 GSO 照明能效標準為準。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency labelling technical regulation for lighting products (adopted and enforced in Oman via MOCIIP / DGSM)
DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology) conformity and product-registration requirements for regulated lighting products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest), Grade 2, and Grade 3, based on absolute luminous efficacy in lm/W; Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC / CECP is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered under SAMR. The CEL grade is calculated from absolute lm/W thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），依据绝对光效（lm/W）规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）、2 级、3 级；3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。GB 30255 涵盖产品的中国能效标识（CEL）注册（向 CQC / CECP）为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。CEL 等级依据绝对 lm/W 阈值计算。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），依據絕對光效（lm/W）規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）、2 級、3 級；3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。GB 30255 涵蓋產品的中國能效標識（CEL）註冊（向 CQC / CECP）為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。CEL 等級依據絕對 lm/W 閾值計算。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR / CQC / CECP

gap.en: Both Oman (GSO label) and China (CEL) operate luminous-efficacy-based energy labels, but the schemes are separate and non-mutual: a CN CEL registration does not satisfy the GSO / DGSM labelling obligation, and the label artwork, grade boundaries, and registration body differ. A product's CN grade does not determine its GSO label rating. Exporters must register the product with a GSO/DGSM-recognized conformity body and apply the GSO energy-efficiency label before market placement in Oman, through an in-country importer. Verify the current GSO efficacy thresholds for the specific lamp / luminaire sub-category, as GSO editions are periodically updated. Note the Oman grid is 240 V 50 Hz (vs China 220 V 50 Hz), so efficacy and driver design should be validated at 240 V.
gap.zh: 阿曼（GSO 标签）与中国（CEL）均采用以光效为基础的能效标签，但两套方案独立且不互认：中国 CEL 注册不满足 GSO / DGSM 标签义务，且标签样式、等级边界与注册机构均不同。产品的中国等级不能决定其 GSO 标签评级。出口商须经 GSO/DGSM 认可的合格评定机构注册产品，并在阿曼上市前经在地进口商贴附 GSO 能效标签。请核查具体灯/灯具子类别现行的 GSO 光效阈值，因 GSO 版本会定期更新。注意阿曼电网为 240 V 50 Hz（中国为 220 V 50 Hz），故应在 240 V 下验证光效与驱动器设计。
gap.zht: 阿曼（GSO 標籤）與中國（CEL）均採用以光效為基礎的能效標籤，但兩套方案獨立且不互認：中國 CEL 註冊不滿足 GSO / DGSM 標籤義務，且標籤樣式、等級邊界與註冊機構均不同。產品的中國等級不能決定其 GSO 標籤評級。出口商須經 GSO/DGSM 認可的合格評定機構註冊產品，並在阿曼上市前經在地進口商貼附 GSO 能效標籤。請核查具體燈/燈具子類別現行的 GSO 光效閾值，因 GSO 版本會定期更新。注意阿曼電網為 240 V 50 Hz（中國為 220 V 50 Hz），故應在 240 V 下驗證光效與驅動器設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (in scope) — GSO energy-efficiency labelling and minimum performance for lighting required before Oman market placement under MOCIIP / DGSM-adopted GSO technical regulation; product registration via a recognized conformity body and in-country importer generally required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration with CQC / CECP required

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman applies GSO energy-efficiency labelling and minimum luminous-efficacy requirements for lighting through MOCIIP / DGSM. In-scope LED lamps and luminaires must carry a GSO energy-efficiency label and be registered via a recognized conformity body and in-country importer before placement. China's GB 30255 grades and CEL registration are based on absolute lm/W but the schemes are non-mutual, so a CN CEL does not substitute for the GSO label. Verify current GSO efficacy thresholds for the specific sub-category and validate performance at 240 V 50 Hz before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼通过 MOCIIP / DGSM 对照明实施 GSO 能效标签及最低光效要求。适用范围内的 LED 灯与灯具上市前须贴附 GSO 能效标签，并经认可的合格评定机构及在地进口商注册。中国 GB 30255 等级与 CEL 注册基于绝对 lm/W，但两套方案不互认，故中国 CEL 不能替代 GSO 标签。出口前请核查具体子类别现行的 GSO 光效阈值，并在 240 V 50 Hz 下验证性能。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼透過 MOCIIP / DGSM 對照明實施 GSO 能效標籤及最低光效要求。適用範圍內的 LED 燈與燈具上市前須貼附 GSO 能效標籤，並經認可的合格評定機構及在地進口商註冊。中國 GB 30255 等級與 CEL 註冊基於絕對 lm/W，但兩套方案不互認，故中國 CEL 不能替代 GSO 標籤。出口前請核查具體子類別現行的 GSO 光效閾值，並在 240 V 50 Hz 下驗證性能。

requirement_topic.en: Product Performance Declaration and Grid Compatibility at 240 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 产品性能声明与 240 V 50 Hz 电网兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 產品性能聲明與 240 V 50 Hz 電網兼容性

summary.en: Beyond the energy label, Oman market placement requires that declared product performance (rated power, luminous flux, efficacy, rated voltage / frequency range) be validated for the Oman grid of 240 V 50 Hz and be consistent with the GSO-adopted performance and safety standards. The rated input range on the product and packaging must cover 240 V 50 Hz; products marked only for 220 V may be deemed non-conforming or unsafe for the local grid. Performance data declared in the GSO label and technical documentation must match the configuration sold in Oman. The legal obligation is the DGSM-adopted GSO technical regulation; the supporting test method follows the applicable GSO/IEC performance and energy standards in force.
summary.zh: 除能效标签外，阿曼上市要求所声明的产品性能（额定功率、光通量、光效、额定电压/频率范围）须针对阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 电网验证，并与 GSO 采纳的性能及安全标准一致。产品及包装上的额定输入范围须覆盖 240 V 50 Hz；仅标注 220 V 的产品可能被认定为不符合或对本地电网不安全。GSO 标签及技术文件中声明的性能数据须与在阿曼销售的配置一致。法律义务来自 DGSM 采纳的 GSO 技术法规；支持性测试方法依据现行适用的 GSO/IEC 性能及能效标准。
summary.zht: 除能效標籤外，阿曼上市要求所聲明的產品性能（額定功率、光通量、光效、額定電壓/頻率範圍）須針對阿曼 240 V 50 Hz 電網驗證，並與 GSO 採納的性能及安全標準一致。產品及包裝上的額定輸入範圍須覆蓋 240 V 50 Hz；僅標註 220 V 的產品可能被認定為不符合或對本地電網不安全。GSO 標籤及技術文件中聲明的性能數據須與在阿曼銷售的配置一致。法律義務來自 DGSM 採納的 GSO 技術法規；支持性測試方法依據現行適用的 GSO/IEC 性能及能效標準。

standards_or_laws: DGSM-adopted GSO performance / energy-efficiency standard for LED lighting (rated voltage and performance declaration; Oman grid 240 V 50 Hz)
GSO/IEC lamp and luminaire performance standards (as adopted in Oman)

summary.en: Chinese LED luminaires are typically designed and rated for the China grid of 220 V 50 Hz, and performance is declared under GB 30255-2019 (efficacy / grade) and the associated China Energy Label. Many CN LED drivers accept a wide input range (e.g. 100-240 V or 176-264 V), but products rated only for 220 V nominal are common in the CN domestic market. Declared performance follows the CN test conditions at 220 V 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国 LED 灯具通常按中国 220 V 50 Hz 电网设计与标定，性能依据 GB 30255-2019（光效/等级）及相应中国能效标识声明。许多中国 LED 驱动器可接受宽输入范围（如 100-240 V 或 176-264 V），但中国国内市场常见仅标定 220 V 标称值的产品。声明性能依据中国在 220 V 50 Hz 下的测试条件。
summary.zht: 中國 LED 燈具通常按中國 220 V 50 Hz 電網設計與標定，性能依據 GB 30255-2019（光效/等級）及相應中國能效標識聲明。許多中國 LED 驅動器可接受寬輸入範圍（如 100-240 V 或 176-264 V），但中國國內市場常見僅標定 220 V 標稱值的產品。聲明性能依據中國在 220 V 50 Hz 下的測試條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (declared at 220 V 50 Hz; SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — performance declaration at CN test conditions

gap.en: The frequency is the same (50 Hz), but the nominal voltage differs: Oman is 240 V while China's domestic rating is commonly 220 V. A driver with a wide input range (covering 240 V) may already be electrically compatible, but the product markings, rated-voltage declaration, and GSO label performance data must reflect 240 V operation, not only 220 V. Exporters should: (1) confirm the driver and luminaire are rated and tested at 240 V 50 Hz; (2) re-mark the rated input on product and packaging to cover 240 V; (3) ensure efficacy / flux declared on the GSO label corresponds to 240 V operation. Performance declared only at 220 V under the CN CEL cannot be carried over unchanged onto the Oman GSO label.
gap.zh: 频率相同（50 Hz），但标称电压不同：阿曼为 240 V，而中国国内标定通常为 220 V。具备宽输入范围（覆盖 240 V）的驱动器电气上可能已兼容，但产品标识、额定电压声明及 GSO 标签性能数据须反映 240 V 运行，而不仅是 220 V。出口商应：（1）确认驱动器与灯具在 240 V 50 Hz 下标定并测试；（2）在产品及包装上重新标注覆盖 240 V 的额定输入；（3）确保 GSO 标签声明的光效/光通量对应 240 V 运行。中国 CEL 下仅在 220 V 声明的性能不能原样套用至阿曼 GSO 标签。
gap.zht: 頻率相同（50 Hz），但標稱電壓不同：阿曼為 240 V，而中國國內標定通常為 220 V。具備寬輸入範圍（覆蓋 240 V）的驅動器電氣上可能已兼容，但產品標識、額定電壓聲明及 GSO 標籤性能數據須反映 240 V 運行，而不僅是 220 V。出口商應：（1）確認驅動器與燈具在 240 V 50 Hz 下標定並測試；（2）在產品及包裝上重新標註覆蓋 240 V 的額定輸入；（3）確保 GSO 標籤聲明的光效/光通量對應 240 V 運行。中國 CEL 下僅在 220 V 聲明的性能不能原樣套用至阿曼 GSO 標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — declared performance and rated voltage must cover the Oman 240 V 50 Hz grid and match the GSO label and technical file before market placement (DGSM-adopted GSO technical regulation)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — performance declared under GB 30255-2019 and the China Energy Label at CN conditions (commonly 220 V 50 Hz)

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman runs at 240 V 50 Hz. Although the 50 Hz frequency matches China, the nominal voltage differs from China's common 220 V rating. Products must be rated, marked, and performance-declared for 240 V operation, and the GSO energy-efficiency label data must correspond to 240 V. A wide-range driver may be electrically compatible, but exporters should re-verify ratings and markings rather than carrying over a 220 V-only CN declaration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼电网为 240 V 50 Hz。虽然 50 Hz 频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国常见的 220 V 标定。产品须按 240 V 运行进行标定、标识及性能声明，且 GSO 能效标签数据须对应 240 V。宽范围驱动器电气上可能兼容，但出口商应重新核验额定值与标识，而非沿用仅 220 V 的中国声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼電網為 240 V 50 Hz。雖然 50 Hz 頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國常見的 220 V 標定。產品須按 240 V 運行進行標定、標識及性能聲明，且 GSO 能效標籤數據須對應 240 V。寬範圍驅動器電氣上可能兼容，但出口商應重新核驗額定值與標識，而非沿用僅 220 V 的中國聲明。
